name: Sneha Patil
review_text:
PERFORMANCE SUMMARY:
Sneha Patil delivered an overall score of 8.4/10 for Q1 2026, with strong delivery (9.3) and quality (8.7). The employee closed 46 Jira tickets with 95% on-time delivery and contributed 71 commits.

KEY STRENGTHS:
- Strong execution with 46 tickets closed.
- Solid engineering output with 14 merged PRs and 18 PR reviews.
- Knowledge sharing through 5 docs created and 9 updates.

AREAS FOR IMPROVEMENT:
- Improve cross-functional documentation visibility and consistency.
- Continue focusing on preventive quality practices to lower rework risk.

RECOMMENDED RATING: 4.0 / 5.0
RECOMMENDED BAND: Exceeds Expectations
